overview.description: The Monarch Ambassador Income Index ETF (MAMB) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Monarch Ambassador Income index. The fund tracks an index that consists of mainly global fixed income ETFs, plus an alternative sleeve. Constituents are selected and weighted based on the economic cycle. MAMB was launched on Mar 23, 2021 and is issued by Monarch.
